title: commersonia dasyphylla
intro: Commersonia dasyphylla, also known as the pink quince, is a flowering plant native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Commersonia dasyphylla include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, such as fever and digestive issues.
